title: Additional Tool Default Hooks
description: Add default post-install hooks for additional tools that would benefit from automatic configuration after installation
acceptance_criteria: Each tool has an idempotent default hook
Hooks follow the established pattern (grep before append)

tasks.title: Add hooks for additional shell tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools that need shell initialization
subtasks: bat: Configure bat as MANPAGER and PAGER
eza: Add common aliases (ls, ll, la)
fd: Add fdfind alias on Debian/Ubuntu

tasks.title: Add hooks for development tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for common development configurations
subtasks: gh: Prompt for auth login if not authenticated
delta: Configure as git diff/merge tool

tasks.title: Add hooks for Kubernetes tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for Kubernetes tooling
subtasks: helm: Add stable repository if not exists

tools_for_consideration.script_preview:
export BAT_PAGER='less -RF'
export MANPAGER='sh -c "col -bx | bat -l man -p"'

alias ls='eza'
alias ll='eza -l'
alias la='eza -la'

git config --global core.pager delta
git config --global interactive.diffFilter 'delta --color-only'
helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami || true

notes: This task is lower priority as the core tools with the most impact (git, kubectl, terraform, shell tools) were handled in PRD-009. These additional hooks are nice-to-have improvements.
